title: Advanced Redstone Blocks
description: Various QoL texture tweaks for redstone-related blocks
body:
Information
---
I thought I could improve a few visual things in my redstone contraptions without leaving the vanilla vibe. 

This pack changes some things to make it easier to tell what's what from whichever angle you may need.

The lite version excludes dispenser/dropper tweaks so they can still be used for decorations (:

Versions
---
This should work in 1.14 to current, maybe 1.13 but I made the textures to fit the Jappa style

I currently have no plans to make this for older versions, but it's not entirely out of the question

Have issues or a suggestion?
---
Report it on the Github issue tracker so I know I need to fix something :D

This tweak not for you?
---
Check out my other projects, I might have something you didn't know you needed! :D
